notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11: Jeddah Season 2024 opened Jun 27, 2024 at Jeddah Art Promenade; the following year ran under theme 'جدة غير'; 2026 opened Jun 20 under Saudi Summer program (GEA-organized).
No official 2027 date announced yet — followed the exact riyadh-season pattern (undisclosed date + historical pattern + immediate update on announcement), estimated type with {{year}}-06-20 anchor.
Only the 2024 date is stated as a literal year (safe, < currentYear-1); the more recent two years are described with relative phrasing (العام الماضي / العام قبل الماضي) to avoid hasHardcodedYear.
Distinguished explicitly from riyadh-season (season, timing, city) per backlog's note this is an identical-pattern build.
